title: Grilled Steak Kebabs
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring marinated steak and vegetables, perfect for a quick dinner or outdoor gathering.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the sirloin cubes, mushrooms, bell peppers, and onion to the bowl. Toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated vegetables and meat onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill grates with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
